/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -Wall -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.8/lib64:/home/dawn/great-DJI-competition/basic_dev/build/plan_env/gtest/lib ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
